entry.title: The New Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: TMRCookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,298Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 81

Summary: "Daddy?" Stiles hummed. "Will I have my own pack someday?" Stiles softly nodded. This child was definitely his child, asking questions. This is a story of Thomas from the Maze Runner being the son of Derek and Stiles from Teen Wolf.   The Maze never happened and some people from fandoms are not dead.

entry.title: A Beautiful Wreckage
entry.summary:
Author: sensingowls

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,224Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 35

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back to Beacon Hills in years, but when he senses Something is Up, he makes the decision to go back to help out. Filled with anxiety, he heads back to the trauma filled nightmare that is his hometown, ready to protect his pack, the love of his life and his son.This fic takes huge liberties with the plot of the movie, featuring Sterek who are idiots in love, a magical, BAMF Stiles, and a demon masquerading as the Nogitsune.

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,923Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 67

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

entry.title: The Spark O' Mine
entry.summary:
Author: tadreen1

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,921Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Stiles's heart flutters nervously in his chest. His entire body, submerged in the bath, burns from the icy water, his teeth clicking against each other with every breath. But on either side of him are Scott and Allison, and it's not like they're currently spiraling into a panic attack. But Scott has an advantage, his werewolf tricks must have given him some extra tolerance to extreme temperatures. And Allison- she's a hunter with an impenetrable, confident face. He looks at Deaton again. Sure, the mysterious veterinarian knows what he's doing. Yeah, he said it was dangerous, but who is Stiles to drown in a bathtub with some herbs that look like parsley? Or in which Nemeton gives Stiles the Spark and now he has to deal with it. And that's not the only problem. NOT COMPLETED!!!

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 1,341

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,753Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 64

entry.title: The Wrong Man in First Class
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,402Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Slutty flight attendant Stiles spots hot, Rolex-wearing Derek in first class and assumes rich jackpot. She turns full whore: short skirt hikes, tits in his face, turbulence dry-hump orgasm, begs raw cock in hotel. Sweet office worker Derek (sent instead of CEO) gets wrecked, falls hard for her greedy pussy. Truth hits: he’s just a salaryman. Stiles tries to bolt—“No money, no me.” Derek snaps—rips her dress, pins her down, fucks her raw and rough: slaps her ass red, chokes her, breeds her deep while growling, “You chased cash, but this ‘poor’ cock owns your cunt now.” She breaks—cums screaming, begs to stay. No more rich fantasies. Just his thick dick owning her forever.

entry.title: carry that weight
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,687Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 96

Summary: “I swear I’m fine, it’s just a stomach bug, I told you,” Stiles mumbles, eyes falling closed again. He could really do with a nap, but this damn pillow— After a moment he hears gentle clicking across the loft’s floor. Derek’s claws are pattering across the ground, and it sounds so cute that Stiles can’t even be annoyed by the excess noise.  Derek whines again, nudging Stiles with his nose when he’s back in his orbit, and Stiles begrudgingly opens his heavy eyes to a sight that makes his heart clench. It’s Derek, still in wolf form, standing before him with earnest puppy dog eyes, clutching Stiles’ pillow in his mouth.

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

entry.summary:
Author: hubrys

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 147,358Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 261

Summary: “To finding someone who makes you more yourself, not less. entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,134Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Just Trust Me, You'll Be Fine
entry.summary:
Author: PigeonTheSmol

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,802Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 301

Summary: The events of Season 1 of The Pitt go the same as they do in the show, but when Dennis gets to Trinity's place there's an additional roommate. Stiles and Dennis become fast friends but both are hiding secrets about why they keep avoiding talking about home. One day a man comes into The Pitt with a bullet lodged into his side and when they check his emergency contact, it's Stiles. But what's more concerning to Dennis is that he recognises the bullet. (Title and some chapter titles taken from End of Beginning by Djo and other songs that I'll credit in each chapter)

  • Theo Raeken is Argyle
  • Time Travel Fix-It
  • Original Character(s)

entry.title: The Road to Sacramento
entry.summary:
Author: hyacinth_fiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,190Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 77

Summary: The universe has a wonderful sense of timing and Stiles and co. are thrown into all kinds of antics when the world goes to hell in a handbasket. Join them as they journey away from the security of their old lives and towards the hope of a new safety. Do they make it? I suppose you'll have to read on to find out. This story is going to be slow burn, like that languid yearning we all know and love seasoned with well-ripened apocalypse angst. There will be spice in this tale, eventually. Solid trigger warning for canon-typical blood/violence, casual swearing, and some other bits I'll stick in the notes of the relevant chapters
